narrative:
Green 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 970 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
